intro:
Match numbers
Beat high scores
Rule the global leaderboard
description:
This is Number Match — a fast, addictive logic game where every move brings you closer to a perfect 10.

Match identical numbers or pairs that total 10. Clear the board. Rack up your score. Chase combos and set records as the pace builds and pressure rises. 

It’s simple. It’s satisfying. And it’s just you versus the board… and everyone else.

With a dynamic leaderboard built into the experience, every match is a battle for the top spot. Whether you're chasing your first win or your next personal best, the race never ends. Pure puzzle gameplay meets arcade energy, designed for quick rounds and long sessions alike.
